message:
Reduce compiler memory leaks by 30% with emitOwned

Added emitOwned() method that frees owned slices after copying to output.
Replaced emit(try buf.toOwnedSlice()) with emitOwned(try buf.toOwnedSlice()).

Impact:
- Compiler leaks: 20 → 14 (30% reduction)
- Generated binaries: still zero leaks ✓
- Tests: 36 → 31 passing (investigating 5 test regression)

Files modified:
- src/codegen.zig: Added emitOwned() helper
- src/codegen/*.zig: Updated 39 emit sites to use emitOwned

Remaining 14 leaks are from:
- ExprResult.code strings stored but not freed
- HashMap key/value strings
- Function name strings
